title: QStash Message
description: A message published to QStash for delivery to a destination URL

messageId.description: Unique identifier for the message assigned by QStash

url.description: Destination URL the message will be delivered to

topicName.description: URL Group name if delivered via URL Group

header.description: HTTP headers from the original publish request

state.description: Current delivery state of the message

createdAt.description: Unix timestamp (milliseconds) when the message was created

notBefore.description: Unix timestamp before which delivery will not be attempted

scheduleId.description: Associated schedule ID if message originated from a schedule

retried.description: Number of delivery attempts made so far

responseStatus.description: HTTP response status code from the last delivery attempt

responseBody.description: Response body from the last delivery attempt

nextDeliveryTime.description: Unix timestamp for the next scheduled delivery attempt

dlqId.description: Dead letter queue identifier (present only if message is in DLQ)

queueName.description: Name of the queue if message was delivered via a queue
